notes: Starter curated movie pool. Hungarian dub statuses are not fully verified unless marked confirmed for Hungarian productions; treat unknown as unverified.

movies.title: The Prestige
movies.whyRecommended: Obsession, sacrifice and identity wrapped in a beautifully engineered puzzle.

movies.title: Arrival
movies.whyRecommended: Elegant, emotional science fiction about language, grief and time.

movies.title: Memories of Murder
movies.whyRecommended: A haunting procedural that becomes a portrait of institutional failure and obsession.

movies.title: Perfect Blue
movies.whyRecommended: A compact psychological nightmare about identity, performance and media.

movies.title: The Handmaiden
movies.whyRecommended: Lush, clever and morally slippery storytelling with superb visual control.

movies.title: Oldboy
movies.whyRecommended: A brutal revenge tragedy with one of cinema's most infamous reveals.

movies.title: Parasite
movies.whyRecommended: A razor-sharp class thriller that keeps changing shape without losing control.

movies.title: Burning
movies.whyRecommended: An atmospheric slow-burn mystery about class, desire and uncertainty.

movies.title: Stalker
movies.whyRecommended: A meditative journey into faith, desire and meaning.

movies.title: Solaris
movies.whyRecommended: A reflective science-fiction ghost story about memory, guilt and love.

movies.title: The Lives of Others
movies.whyRecommended: A precise and deeply humane drama about surveillance and conscience.

movies.title: Incendies
movies.whyRecommended: A devastating family mystery with mythic force and emotional brutality.

movies.title: Prisoners
movies.whyRecommended: A grim, gripping moral thriller about fear, rage and justice.

movies.title: Enemy
movies.whyRecommended: A strange identity puzzle with oppressive atmosphere and lingering unease.

movies.title: Blade Runner 2049
movies.whyRecommended: Monumental visual science fiction about memory, loneliness and personhood.

movies.title: Children of Men
movies.whyRecommended: A terrifyingly grounded dystopia with astonishing filmmaking momentum.

movies.title: Pan's Labyrinth
movies.whyRecommended: A cruel fairy tale where fantasy and fascism bleed into each other.

movies.title: The Devil's Backbone
movies.whyRecommended: A tender and eerie ghost story rooted in wartime trauma.

movies.title: Her
movies.whyRecommended: A gentle futuristic romance about loneliness, intimacy and change.

movies.title: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind
movies.whyRecommended: A formally playful and painful story about memory and love.

movies.title: Synecdoche, New York
movies.whyRecommended: A huge, sad, absurd meditation on art, mortality and self-delusion.

movies.title: Adaptation.
movies.whyRecommended: A hilarious and clever film about writing itself into a corner.

movies.title: Being John Malkovich
movies.whyRecommended: A brilliantly bizarre identity comedy with sharp existential teeth.

movies.title: The Lobster
movies.whyRecommended: A cold, funny and disturbing satire of relationships and conformity.

movies.title: Dogtooth
movies.whyRecommended: A controlled and unsettling absurdist experiment about language and control.

movies.title: The Favourite
movies.whyRecommended: A poisonous palace comedy with savage performances and formal confidence.

movies.title: The Killing of a Sacred Deer
movies.whyRecommended: An icy moral nightmare with ancient-tragedy logic.

movies.title: A Serious Man
movies.whyRecommended: A bleakly comic Job story about uncertainty and cosmic indifference.

movies.title: No Country for Old Men
movies.whyRecommended: A ruthless and beautifully controlled meditation on violence and fate.

movies.title: Barton Fink
movies.whyRecommended: A sweaty Hollywood nightmare about art, ego and hellish writer's block.

movies.title: Fargo
movies.whyRecommended: A perfectly balanced crime story of stupidity, greed and decency.

movies.title: Mulholland Drive
movies.whyRecommended: A terrifying Hollywood dream about identity, desire and failure.

movies.title: Blue Velvet
movies.whyRecommended: A descent beneath suburban surfaces into desire and violence.

movies.title: Lost Highway
movies.whyRecommended: A fractured identity nightmare with pure Lynchian dread.

movies.title: The Elephant Man
movies.whyRecommended: A compassionate and visually rich tragedy about dignity and cruelty.

movies.title: The Tree of Life
movies.whyRecommended: A cosmic family memory that turns grief into visual poetry.

movies.title: The Thin Red Line
movies.whyRecommended: A war film more interested in soul, nature and fear than spectacle.

movies.title: Ikiru
movies.whyRecommended: A deeply moving film about mortality, bureaucracy and meaning.

movies.title: High and Low
movies.whyRecommended: A masterful procedural that begins as a moral dilemma and expands into social critique.

movies.title: Rashomon
movies.whyRecommended: A compact and foundational inquiry into truth and perspective.

movies.title: Seven Samurai
movies.whyRecommended: A towering ensemble epic about duty, class and sacrifice.

movies.title: Ran
movies.whyRecommended: A monumental Shakespearean tragedy painted in fire, colour and collapse.

movies.title: Harakiri
movies.whyRecommended: A devastating anti-authoritarian samurai film built like a moral trap.

movies.title: Kwaidan

movies.title: Woman in the Dunes
movies.whyRecommended: An existential trap-film about desire, labour and absurdity.

movies.title: Audition

movies.title: Shoplifters

movies.title: A Ghost Story

movies.title: Biutiful

movies.title: Birdman

movies.title: The Revenant

movies.title: Roma

movies.title: Y Tu Mamá También

movies.title: Black Swan

movies.title: Network

movies.title: Dunkirk

movies.title: Interstellar

movies.title: Fight Club

movies.title: The Social Network

movies.title: Thief

movies.title: Once Upon a Time in America
